hook: Your environment quietly decides how often confidence gets a chance to practice.
body: If your week contains no natural social friction, dating will keep feeling like an isolated high-pressure event.

hook: Many men focus on confidence techniques while ignoring the structure of a life that rarely requires social use.
body: Design a week that gives confidence somewhere to live, not just somewhere to be tested.

body: A recurring class, sport, club, or volunteer group creates better raw material for growth than waiting for ideal opportunities to appear.

hook: A recurring class, sport, club, or volunteer group creates better raw material for growth than waiting for ideal opportunities to appear.
body: Add one repeatable social environment before you ask dating to carry your whole confidence project.
